raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Describes a pivotal realization or admission in a structured recovery program, framing belief in a higher power as a step toward recovery.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The individual previously lacked sanity or rational control due to their condition",
    "A Power greater than oneself exists",
    "This Power possesses the capacity to restore sanity"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent within a spiritual/self-help framework that treats recovery as dependent on external higher power rather than solely individual agency.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The recipient finds personal psychological benefit, motivation, or reduced shame from adopting a belief in a higher power that supports behavioral change and sobriety.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is treated as an empirically testable claim rather than a personal/spiritual tenet, or it discourages evidence-based treatment by implying supernatural intervention is necessary or sufficient."
}
